tests.scenarioIntent: Verify Bank Transfer is always-on (no admin toggle) and present in the company's enabled payment methods.

blockers: BLOCKED (test.skip): Intentionally deferred — no known numeric ID for Wise in the company list API; no admin surface to assert against (KNOWN-ISSUES C). Wise availability is verified in the payment processing flow instead.

tests.scenarioIntent: BLOCKED (test.skip): Intentionally deferred — no known numeric ID for Mercury in the company list API; no admin surface to assert against (KNOWN-ISSUES C). Mercury availability is verified in the payment processing flow instead.

dependencies: prior enable tests in same serial suite

tests.title: Should disable a payment method @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: Disable Credit/Debit Card on the company and verify it is removed from the enabled list while Bank Transfer survives the disable (full-list replacement model).

tests.title: Should round-trip enable then disable a payment method @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: Round-trip SEPA: enable then disable, verifying the enabled list reflects each transition correctly.

tests.title: Should disable each toggleable payment method individually @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: For each toggleable method: reset all-on baseline, disable the method, verify cross-method isolation (others unaffected, Bank Transfer survives), then re-enable. Proves disable affects only the targeted method.

tests.title: Should bulk-enable all toggleable methods in one call @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: Bulk-enable all toggleable methods in a single setPaymentMethods call and verify all are active afterward.

tests.title: Should reject enabling payment method with invalid company ID (BACKEND_GAP, currently fails) @regression
tests.scenarioIntent: test.fail (expected-fail): documents a backend gap where POST /api/admin/company/update silently accepts non-existent company IDs (returns 200/success). Asserts intended 4xx behavior; flips to hard failure when backend is hardened.

tests.title: Should not allow non-admin to enable payment methods @regression
